title: Daniel Morgan and the Trap at Cowpens
author: Roughdraft Stories
description: Daniel Morgan rose from rough frontier labor to become one of the Revolutionary War's sharpest battlefield thinkers. This factual narrative follows his riflemen, Quebec, Saratoga, and the clever plan that broke Tarleton at Cowpens.

chapters.title: A Hard Man from the Backcountry
A Victory Larger Than One Field
